name: Lemon-Tipped Pistachio Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shelled salted roasted pistachio nuts (chop coarse)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, mix flour and baking powder; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter, sugar, and lemon zest until well blended.
3. Beat in Egg, then Egg whites. Add vanilla. Gradually add flour mixture, beating until well combined. Stir in pistachios.
4. Divide dough into two halves. On a lightly floured board, shape each half into a long loaf about 1 1/2 inches in diameter. Place loaves about 3 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
5. Flatten each loaf to a thickness of about 1/2 inch. Bake in a 350°F oven until firm to the touch, 15 to 18 minutes.
6. Remove baking sheet from oven and cut hot loaves crosswise into about 1/2 inch thick slices. Turn slices cut side down and spread slightly on two baking sheets. Return to oven and continue to bake until cookies look dry and are lightly browned, about 10 more minutes.
7. Transfer cookies to wire racks and let cool completely. Prepare Lemon Icing by stirring together the sugar and lemon zest in a small bowl. Add just enough lemon juice to give icing a good spreading consistency.
8. Spread icing over about 1 inch of one end of each cookie. Let stand until icing is firm, about 15 minutes.
9. Store airtight. Makes about 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
